commands.review_summary:
Adds Control UI mocked Gateway E2E assertions that one startup-race chat send emits pending-visible, request-start, ack, and first-assistant-visible timing payloads with ACK and first-assistant duration fields.

PR surface: Tests +47. Total +47 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR adds regression coverage rather than reporting a runtime bug. The behavior under test is traceable in current source through app-chat telemetry recording and app-gateway chat event handling.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed because the read-only review found no concrete code defect to fix.

target.title: test(ui): cover control chat send timing phases
target.body:
Summary:
- Extend the Control UI mocked Gateway E2E startup-race chat send case to require the real composer path to emit `pending-visible`, `request-start`, `ack`, and `first-assistant-visible` timing for the same run.
- Assert ACK request duration and first-assistant timing payload fields so future first-message latency work cannot silently drop this telemetry.

Verification:
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.ui-e2e.config.ts --configLoader runner ui/src/ui/e2e/chat-flow.e2e.test.ts`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 ui/src/ui/e2e/chat-flow.e2e.test.ts`
- `OPENCLAW_OXLINT_SKIP_PREPARE=1 OPENCLAW_OXLINT_SKIP_LOCK=1 node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json ui/src/ui/e2e/chat-flow.e2e.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode commit --commit HEAD`

Proof gaps:
- `pnpm check:changed` in this linked worktree hit pnpm's non-TTY modules purge guard before running checks.
- Blacksmith Testbox `tbx_01kt6fgz7k2796qa04fzrdjh2k` stayed queued for 4m+ and was stopped before any command ran.
- Direct AWS Crabbox was blocked by coordinator HTTP 401 before lease allocation.
target.author: vincentkoc
